Inclusion Criteria:
* Has documented disease progression after prior PD-1 therapy
* Has provided tissue from a newly obtained biopsy of a tumor lesion

Exclusion Criteria:
* Has received previous treatment with an agent targeting KRAS
* Has active central nervous system metastases
* Has active inflammatory bowel disease requiring immunosuppressive medication or previous history of inflammatory bowel disease
* Has uncontrolled or significant cardiovascular disorder or cerebrovascular disease prior to allocation/randomization
* Have not adequately recovered from major surgery or have ongoing surgical complications
